# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    apt-transport-https \
    ca-certificates \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $(lsb_release -cs) stable" \
    | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null \
    && apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y docker-ce-cli \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN groupadd -g 999 docker || true

RUN useradd -m -s /bin/bash -G docker orchestrator

WORKDIR /app

COPY . /app/

RUN chown -R orchestrator:orchestrator /app

USER orchestrator

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f --unix-socket /var/run/docker.sock http://localhost/version || exit 1

ENTRYPOINT ["/app/entrypoint.sh"]
